title: deguelia polyantha
intro: Deguelia polyantha, also known as the "Uvaria" plant, is a type of climbing plant that belongs to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Deguelia polyantha include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
